description_long: This is a single bed with a rectangular wooden frame and a visible headboard at one end. The frame is constructed from a light brown wood with a subtle grain pattern, giving it a natural and sturdy appearance. The mattress is white with a minimalistic black geometric pattern on its surface, and it fits snugly within the frame. The headboard is solid and slightly thicker than the rest of the frame, providing support and a visual anchor. The foot of the bed is enclosed by a lower wooden panel, matching the sides and headboard. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for urban environments such as apartments, dormitories, or temporary shelters.
description: A single wooden bed with a solid headboard, white mattress featuring a black geometric pattern, and a simple, sturdy frame.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bed, the wooden frame, and the solid headboard on the left.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the headboard and the width of the mattress within the wooden frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the headboard on the right, displaying the same wooden frame and mattress.
description_view_3: Foot view showing the lower wooden footboard and the end of the mattress with the geometric pattern visible.
